pageDescription: Check if your email addresses have been exposed in known data breaches

summary.emailsMonitoredTooltip: Basic plan: 1 email · Pro plan: 5 emails. Upgrade your plan in Cloud settings to monitor more.

toast.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
toast.limitReached: Email limit reached for your plan

emptyState.noEmailsDesc: Add an email address to check for past data breaches and continuously monitor for new leaks.
emptyState.allClearDesc: None of your monitored emails have been found in any known data breaches.
emptyState.upgradeRequiredDesc: Breach monitoring is available on the Basic plan and above. Upgrade your plan to start monitoring.
emptyState.noBreachesForEmail: No breaches found for this email
emptyState.selectEmail: Select an email from the list to view breach details

error.title: Failed to load breach data
error.description: Check your cloud connection and try again.

actions.acknowledgeTooltip: Mark this breach as seen so it no longer appears as new or triggers notifications
actions.acknowledgeAllTooltip: Mark all unreviewed breaches as seen
